content: 8GB Mac fits roughly one small model (~3-4B quantized). whisper.cpp needs 1-3GB, Ollama with small model 3-5GB+. Combined exceeds 8GB causing swap death. macOS aggressively swaps; Metal/MPS may give up model residency causing performance yo-yoing (ollama/ollama#4151). OOM kills confirmed by community. Mitigation: run sequentially not simultaneously, use Q4 quantization, smallest models (Qwen 0.5B, Llama 3.2 1B), monitor memory_pressure. 8GB is minimum viable for single small model only.
